{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Commander Nelthan
| introduced = lh-01-the-captain
}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Nelthan]] is a [[Commander]] of the [[GSS Kholien]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c36">''The Captain'', chapter 36</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|“Captain Vallenar, this is Commander Nelthan of GSS Kholien.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c36" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
